Subject: Fake Microsoft password reset
Message Body: Your Microsoft account will be suspended within 24 hours. Verify your password now at http://microsoft-security-alert-login.example.com/reset

Message Body: We need you to update your direct deposit immediately using this secure payroll form.

Message Body: Please review the urgent invoice attached and send payment today.
